themes.title: Notification Reliability
themes.description: Enhancing the reliability of notification delivery.

themes.title: Advanced Notification Features
themes.description: Introducing advanced features for better user experience.

milestones.name: Fix Silent Notification Failures
milestones.description: Address critical silent notification failures on Android 14.
milestones.success_criteria: Silent notifications are delivered without failure on Android 14 devices.

milestones.name: Reduce Notification Delivery Latency
milestones.description: Implement strategies to reduce the latency of notification delivery.
milestones.success_criteria: Notification delivery latency is reduced by at least 30%.

milestones.name: Implement ML-based Notification Batching
milestones.description: Introduce machine learning techniques for batching notifications.
milestones.success_criteria: ML-based batching is implemented and reduces notification overload by 25%.

milestones.name: Monitor Notification Delivery Performance
milestones.description: Set up monitoring for notification delivery performance metrics.
milestones.success_criteria: Performance metrics are collected and reported with a dashboard.

milestones.name: Document Notification System Compliance
milestones.description: Ensure compliance documentation for the notification system is complete.
milestones.success_criteria: Compliance documentation is reviewed and approved by stakeholders.

sequencing.reason: Fixing silent notification failures is critical before reducing latency.
Latency reduction must be completed to effectively implement ML-based batching.
ML-based batching needs to be in place to monitor its performance.
Performance monitoring insights are necessary for compliance documentation.

mvp.goal: Establish a reliable notification system with minimal failures.

v1.goal: Enhance notification features and performance monitoring.
